title: Moist Venezuelan Avocado Sushi
description: Earthy, pillowy avocado rolls seasoned with allspice and lemon, perfect for a cozy Venezuelan-inspired snack.
instructions: Rinse the sushi rice until the water runs clear, then cook it with 1 cup rice and 1 1/4 cup water for 15 minutes and let it rest, covered, for 10 minutes.
While the rice rests, whisk together rice vinegar, sugar, and salt until dissolved.
Spread the cooked rice onto a sheet of plastic wrap on a flat surface, sprinkle the vinegar mixture evenly, and fold the plastic over to cool.
Slice the avocado into thin strips and drizzle with lemon juice and a pinch of allspice.
Lay a nori sheet flat, spread a thin layer of seasoned rice over the sheet, leaving a 1 cm border.
Arrange avocado strips in a line across the center of the rice.
Roll the nori tightly into a cylinder, sealing the edge with a little water.
Slice the roll into 6 equal pieces, drizzle each with a touch of olive oil, and serve immediately.
